title: Backend and Composition Faults in an Unattended LLM-Agent System: A Fault-Injection Study and Field Log — Replication Package
description: Replication artifacts for the ReSAISE 2026 paper (4th IEEE International Workshop on Reliable and Secure AI for Software Engineering, co-located with ISSRE 2026). Includes a self-contained mechanism reproduction (standalone_demo.py) of the three measured deltas (pure-data fallback 4/4 vs 0/4; per-agent isolation blast radius 1 vs 6; defensive loader 3/3 vs 0/3), the fault-injection result file, a redacted retrospective incident file, and the log-mining classifier. Raw operator logs are private and not included.
